note: Core lessons from markdown.engineering (v2.1.88), verified and updated against live v2.1.90/v2.1.91/v2.1.92/v2.1.94/v2.1.96 binaries. Chapter 10 (L57-L59) covers v2.1.92 changes. Chapter 11 (L60-L61) adds v2.1.94 command and env-var changes, including /autofix-pr, /team-onboarding, Mantle provider support, CLAUDE_CODE_MCP_ALLOWLIST_ENV, and CLAUDE_CODE_SANDBOXED. No new lessons were required for v2.1.96 because it is a bugfix-only release relative to v2.1.94.
